generator: openai/gpt-image-2/edit via FAL; no post-processing; high quality
reason_for_v2: V1 was too generic/basic. V2 pushes unique layered product-art direction that makes the prompt desirable.
master_prompt: Transform a small amber Vitamin C serum dropper bottle into a surreal citrus-reactor skincare campaign: preserve amber glass, black dropper, white label and orange brightening accent; place the bottle inside translucent orange-peel helixes, amber glass rings, liquid serum ribbons, micro droplets, refracted golden light, and editorial dark-to-warm studio lighting; create multiple shots including hero, deconstructed packaging, macro droplet universe, skin-glow landscape, and monsoon glasshouse; high-end commercial product art, impossible studio set, no generic ecommerce styling.

slides.prompt:
Create ONE square 1:1 image for a GenLabs Prompt Drop product carousel.
Primary reference product: small amber glass Vitamin C serum dropper bottle with black rubber dropper, black cap, white label, orange BRIGHTEN/Vitamin C accent. Preserve this product silhouette and packaging identity as much as possible.
Secondary style references are only for bold prompt-gallery art direction: editorial, striking, unusual, high-design. Do not copy their subjects or text.

This must NOT look like normal ecommerce product photography. Avoid basic citrus next to bottle, generic lab, generic spa stones, simple dew surface, or ordinary clean packshot. Build a distinctive layered visual world that makes people want the prompt.
No big ugly text overlays. No random typography. No fake logos/watermarks. If text appears, it should be only the product label or extremely subtle art-direction marks.

Visual world: CITRUS REACTOR — a surreal high-end skincare campaign. The amber serum bottle floats upright inside a translucent spiral helix made from orange peel, amber glass, and liquid serum ribbons. Around it: suspended micro droplets, thin glass rings, refracted golden light, citrus membranes like stained glass, clean dark-to-warm gradient background. Product label faces camera enough to read main Vitamin C/BRIGHTEN identity. Editorial, impossible studio set, dramatic shadows, artful negative space, ultra-detailed commercial render.
